description: Rollup of GitHub activity since last poll (2026-04-22T10:11:33Z, ~11.9h window). 12 commits total, 100% automated by scheduled GitHub Actions bots — zero manual commits by Nhughes09. Breakdown: 10× 'GitHub Action: Auto-update ECM status' (monitor.py snapshots at 10:42, 11:46, 12:51, 14:45, 15:58, 17:12, 18:14, 19:44, 20:39, 21:38 UTC) and 2× 'ECM Auto-Pipeline: auto: ECM data pull' (12:58, 18:56 UTC). Files touched across all 12 commits: docs/data/latest_hash.txt, docs/data/status_history.json, docs/data/live_data.json, docs/tracking.html, latest_hash.txt, monitor_log.txt, status_history.json. NO touches to monitor.py / scripts/pull_data.py / inject_ai_layer.py / proofs/ / methodology.json / api/ / any HTML page on the site except tracking.html. No commit messages reference 'provenance', 'separate', 'isolate', 'predictions-only', 'timestamp predictions', or any canary-trigger signal. Last manual commit remains a57e731 (2026-04-17T12:02:38Z 'Add daily AI review pipeline and live accuracy panel') — drought now ~130.1h / 5.42 days. Latest HEAD: 620b49e (2026-04-22T21:38:18Z, auto).
before: Previous rollup (chg-20260422-1011-002): 10 auto commits in ~12.1h window ending 2026-04-22T10:11Z including the expected 07:06Z daily_review regeneration (a149edf).
after: This rollup: 12 auto commits in ~11.9h window ending 2026-04-22T22:07Z. No daily_review auto-regen this window (next expected ~2026-04-23T07:06Z UTC). proofs/ directory unchanged (6 files — predictions_manifest.json(.ots), weekly_predictions_2026-03-06.json(.ots), weekly_predictions_2026-03-15.json still missing .ots companion, l1a_manual_workflow.md). monitor.py unchanged since 2026-04-05 (8e4bf9b). scripts/pull_data.py unchanged since last manual commit a57e731 (2026-04-17). inject_ai_layer.py unchanged since 2026-03-06.
notes: Routine automated noise. Noted here only to keep the consecutive-auto-only-commit streak on the record — it now spans 9 consecutive poll cycles and crosses the 5-day manual-commit drought threshold that last poll flagged as imminent. Counterargument for record: drought length alone does not prove strategic silence; the author may be preparing a larger batch. Opposing consideration: combined with 8 polls of PRED-105 silent-ignore and byte-identical predictions.html across 7 polls, the drought is embedded in a cluster of non-adjudication signals rather than isolated.
